title: JOB SEARCH AND EMPLOYEE DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO JOB SEARCH AND EMPLOYEE DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps to remove barriers to employment and provide training and education that people might need for their new job or for their current job. Job Club also offers support with online job searching, resume building and interview preparation. 265 SE Oak Street Suite A Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 336-9895 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 336-9895 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County, with priority for City of Hillsboro residents SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located one block from Hillsboro Central / SE 3rd Ave Transit Center MAX Blue line, and TriMet bus lines: 46, 47, 48, 57 Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT BASIC EDUCATION, JOB SEARCH, AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT EMPLOYMENT - CAREER DEVELOPMENT AND SKILLS ASSESSMENT WORKSHOP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO
